attributes.description: Web Application Firewall activity for Azure Application Gateway: rule matches, actions, offending clients.
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"type":"markdown","embeddableConfig":{"content":"## [Azure Application Gateway OTel] WAF

Firewall log activity for the Application Gateway WAF policy.
- Total rule matches vs distinct requests affected
- Action mix (Matched / Detected / Blocked); `Blocked` only appears in Prevention mode
- Rule-group distribution (SQLi, XSS, LFI, RCE, scanner, protocol)
- Top offending client IPs and matched rules
- WAF evaluation time
